title: AUL Field-Disclosure Bundle v1
description: JSON Schema for the field-disclosure payload format defined in spec/v1.md §10. Normative for structural validation.

field_path.description: Dot-notation path of the disclosed field. MUST appear in the spec §10.4 canonicalization table.

field_value.description: Canonicalized field value (per §10.4 rule for field_path). UTF-8 string.

merkle_path.description: Sibling path from leaf to root (may be empty for single-leaf trees).

root.description: Merkle root of the per-event field-commitment tree. 64-char lowercase hex.

event_hash.description: Binding to the verification bundle. MUST equal bundle.event_hash exactly. 64-char lowercase hex.
